name: NV5 Global, Inc.
description: NV5 Global, Inc. is a leading provider of professional and technical engineering and consulting solutions. The company offers a comprehensive range of services, including planning, design, inspection, and management for infrastructure, building, environmental, and geospatial projects. Serving both public and private sector clients, NV5 operates over 100 offices across the United States and internationally. With a strong management team and extensive industry experience, the firm is dedicated to delivering innovative, high-quality solutions that support sustainable development and complex technical challenges in various industries.
